step_by_step_reasoning: The architecture shows Samsung Cloud's global network backbone connecting multiple regions (KR, US, EU, SG) using AWS Transit Gateway. Each region contains VPCs that connect to their respective regional Transit Gateway. The Transit Gateways are peered globally to form a private network. Additionally, the architecture incorporates hybrid cloud connectivity using Direct Connect Gateway to connect an On-Premises Data Center, and Site-to-Site VPN to connect other services.

graph.name: Samsung Cloud Global Network Architecture with AWS Transit Gateway
graph.notes: Global transit VPC backbone network using peered AWS Transit Gateways across KR, US, EU, and SG regions, with planned expansion to On-Premises DC and external services via Direct Connect and Site-to-Site VPN.

nodes.notes: Transit Gateway in Korea region to route traffic between local VPCs and other regions.
